name: Online Reduction (Triton)
trigger: Reduction operation (Softmax, LayerNorm, RMSNorm) on large tensors, memory-bound
approach: Use online algorithm: compute running max/sum in single pass instead of multi-pass. Tile rows across thread blocks. Use shared memory for partial reductions within blocks. For Softmax: online max + exp + sum in one pass avoids materializing intermediate tensors.
